"D:\CPP DK\bin\ar.exe" qc liblinter_core.a CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/core/LinterEngine.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/core/ReportManager.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/rules/IndentRule.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/rules/VarNameRule.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/rules/LineLengthRule.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/rules/UninitVarRule.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/rules/MemoryLeakRule.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/utils/FileReader.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/linter_core.dir/src/utils/FileIterator.cpp.obj
"D:\CPP DK\bin\ranlib.exe" liblinter_core.a
